case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. LUIZA OJEA CASTRO

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 74147901) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74147901) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, LUIZA OJEA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-24-2025
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-08-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 76585795) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 76585795)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-08-2025 CONTINUED TO JUL-08-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 74147901) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-08-2025 CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-09-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74147901) TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
